{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173647BEBC9258AAA5C3C302C0"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7435321731829416766","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角不全能，凭啥开后宫，是不是[你细品]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731180575,"group_id":"7428458421994671166","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4495282587310883"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428458421994671166","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5872,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7435324747210294078","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者加油，金手指给的很到位，主角性格率真不做作，懂得把握机会。想看主角一步步变的更强更优秀，希望能在这个变强的过程中，周围的人都能感受到并震惊。毕竟这种类型的文，主角剧情上不能太低调不然没爽感。天赋和技能最好分清点，天赋最好就是加持学习技能速度和发挥技能威力大小类型的，最好不需要升级。要学的技能一定要多点，但不是说等级多，等级维持在5级左右就可以满级了。不然等级太高，技能升级速度又慢，而且需要学习的技能还特别多，会感觉在压主角，读者会感觉水和拖沓。看书本就是让人来放松心情的，看好你哦！[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731180394,"group_id":"7428458421994671166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一名喜欢看小说的路人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny2bkkzMVucUnuepGiVHJyaBfkH75OzHUfpyLPy5FgM0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2c4ddebc998140c3be9cf8da3ca46ad7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534495&x-signature=mkq3X3Lstg%2Fb7jGtJgaCQMj9bKw%3D","user_id":"4495282587310883","user_name":"爱吃印花饼干的洛会长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4495282587310883","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428458421994671166","book_info":{"abstract":"【不重生】+【系统】+【青春校园】+【恋爱喜剧】+【日常】
当普通人陈耳东却在18岁的时候完美人生系统却不期而至。
看着这经常犯病的系统，陈耳东不知道是福是祸。
不过系统都来了，那我不玩点骚的合适吗？

【任务：你总是习惯性的走这条路，每天都是一样的景色。】
【不如让我们换一条路如何？也许这条路有不一样的景色也说不定，可能有更多的美女、更好的风光、也有可能有UFO。】
